CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-20-2003 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2003 Continued To May-30-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 On April 7, 2003
Off Calendar Apr-07-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Leticia Perez. The Court notes for the record that default has been entered against Global Vision, Consortia, Inc. Elisabeth Freeman, Kimberly Herrera, Michael Real and CIRC Inc. Based on received, the court grants judgment as follows: $26,436.05, Prejudgment Interest: $919.48, Attorney Fees: $2,825.00, Costs: $400.64 for a total judgment of $30,581.17. Order signed.
